meaning: SEquential Couleur Avec Memoire SECAM制式(顺序与存储彩色电视系统)
examples: SECAM uses the same bandwidth as PAL but transmits the colour information sequentially.
You can alter this behavior by editing /etc/kboot.conf — for the purposes of this article series, you'll want to run in one of the RGB modes, either 480i for NTSC users or 576i for PAL/SECAM users.
